candidates.why: This is the main operating/top-line revenue figure; other operating revenues are ancillary.
Represents ancillary operating revenue, not the primary top-line, so less appropriate than Operating revenues for total revenue.
This is clearly a cost of sales / direct production cost line item, matching COGS definition.
This is an inventory asset on the balance sheet, not a period expense, so not appropriate for COGS.
This is revenue, not an operating expense; should be excluded from SG&A components.
Explicit SG&A component (stock-based comp within SGA), fits overhead definition and should be included.
Represents a broad operating expense bucket likely encompassing SG&A-type overhead; no explicit single SG&A total is provided among candidates, so this is an appropriate SG&A bucket.
Clearly an overhead operating expense component and not labeled as a total; appropriate as part of SG&A components.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not the current-period R&D expense itself; less appropriate than the explicit R&D expense line.
Explicit current-period research & development expense line on the income statement; best match for XRD.
Balance sheet asset for capitalized R&D, not a period expense.
Accumulated amortization balance, not current-period expense.
Primary income statement line for interest expense; best representation of XINT.
Represents profit attribution to non-controlling interests, not interest expense.
Same as attribution to non-controlling interests, not an interest cost.
OCI attributable to non-controlling interests, unrelated to interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Component of interest expense related to lease liabilities; useful detail but less complete than total Interest Expense for XINT.
Debt balance, not an expense flow; inappropriate for XINT.
Equity of minority shareholders, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests equity, not interest expense.
Represents equity attributable to owners of the parent only; excludes non-controlling interests, so slightly less complete than total Equity for BE.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; best representation of book equity for BE.
This is total assets/total balance sheet, not equity; inappropriate for BE.
Income statement flow of profit attributable to NCI, not the balance sheet minority equity; BE/MIB usually uses balance sheet amount.
Appears to be same income statement attribution; again a flow rather than stock.
OCI flow attributable to NCI; not the stock of minority interest on the balance sheet.
Balance sheet line representing equity attributable to non-controlling (minority) shareholders; ideal for MIB.
Duplicate naming of non-controlling interests; same concept, but one selection is sufficient. Prefer the modern label Non-controlling interests.
